prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of TXN (Texas Instruments), the stock typically exhibits annualized volatility around 25-30%. For a 21-day period, this translates to approximately 6-7% standard deviation. The point estimate assumes modest upward momentum given semiconductor sector fundamentals. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with increasing widths for higher confidence levels, accounting for typical daily price movements and potential market volatility over the 3-week timeframe.
